items.title: Access Permissions
items.description: Admin-only guides for permission sets and access control.

items.title: Create users in bulk
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to upload a CSV file to upload users in bulk. This is useful when you have a large number of users to be added or modified.

items.title: Create users individually
items.description: SmartWinnr allows administrators to create users individually through the backend portal.

items.title: Delete users
items.description: You can delete users from SmartWinnr in bulk.

items.title: How can an Admin change anyone's password?
items.description: You can change the password of a user by following the below steps.

items.title: How can I change the password for a user account?
items.description: With the Admin role in SmartWinnr, you can change the password for users from the division and subdivisions you have access to.

items.title: How do I give access permission to other editors?
items.description: As an Editor in SmartWinnr, you can give access permission to various tasks that you create to other editors. Tasks include:

items.title: How do I unlock an account?
items.description: An account can be locked if a wrong password is entered 5 times.

items.title: How to activate automatic reminders for your quizzes
items.description: Automated reminder feature allows you to create and schedule reminders to be delivered to the quiz takers about their assigned quizzes.

items.title: How to activate or deactivate a user?
items.description: If you have selected the “Set password by user” option during bulk user creation, SmartWinnr will send a welcome mail to the user with an activation link.

items.title: How to Add a new Division?
items.description: Go to Admin>>Manage Divisions, it will open the following page

items.title: How to Add new contacts?
items.description: Go to Admin>>Manage Contacts>>Click on Upload Contacts as shown below

items.title: How to Add new rule?
items.description: Go to Admin>> Rules>>Add Rule.

items.title: How to allow multiple attempts
items.description: We have implemented a new logic for quizzes where Allow Multiple Attempts is enabled.

items.title: How to change company logo?
items.description: Go to ADMIN > Company Settings > Company Profile tab.

items.title: How to create a group?
items.description: Follow the steps below to create a group in SmartWinnr:

items.title: How to Enable a Chat Group?
items.description: Follow the below steps to enable a chat group:

items.title: How to enable the Streaming Links for Video Coaching
items.description: Go to Editor > Coaching > Video Coaching > View Coaching. Click on 'Create Coaching' button.

items.title: How to give other editors access to a particular activity/task you created in SmartWinnr
items.description: Once a task like a quiz, survey, coaching, SmartFeeds, competition etc are created in SmartWinnr, there is an option to provide other editors access to this…

items.title: How to resend account invitation?
items.description: In case the user is in “Pending” state and have not received the invitation email, you can resent the invitation to the user. To resend the account invitation:

items.title: How to send an Absent Reminder to Participants by the trainer to Improve Attendance
items.description: An Editor who has access to the SmartPaths can send the Absent Reminder to the learners.

items.title: How to send quizzes, surveys and content using group?
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to send Quizzes, Surveys, and Content to a predefined set of users using Groups, making distribution quick and efficient.

items.title: How to set competencies.
items.description: Only users with Admin role can add/modify competencies.

items.title: How to Set Reminder for your Tasks
items.description: This feature lets you set a reminder and schedule it to be delivered to the users about the status of the Task.

items.title: How to track my organizational resource usage?
items.description: Manage your Organizational resource usage

items.title: How to view an Audit Log?
items.description: Go to Admin>>Audit Logs, it will open the following page.

items.title: How to view existing contacts?
items.description: To view the existing contacts, go to Admin>>Manage Contacts

items.title: Manage password policy
items.description: You can set the organization password complexity from this page. Once set, all users will have to abide by this password policy.

items.title: Search users
items.description: SmartWinnr provides a powerful search functionality to search user by different attributes.

items.title: What is a Group?
items.description: In SmartWinnr, a Group is a collection of users that can be created and managed by Trainers/Editors.

items.title: What is a Rule?
items.description: Rules are a "set of activities that will be triggered based on certain conditions".

items.title: What is Audit Log?
items.description: The concept of audit logs is simple. When a change is applied to a system, it correlates with a change in the system’s behavior.
